channel.title: Kunal Das — Writing
channel.description: Notes on building cross-platform apps — Kotlin Multiplatform, Compose, React Native.

item.title: One Kotlin codebase, three platforms: building Multidex with Compose Multiplatform
item.description: How a single Kotlin Multiplatform codebase ships a Pokédex app to Android, iOS and Desktop — module architecture, adaptive Material 3 layouts, palette-driven theming, and lessons learned.
